meta.notes: Songs and samples refreshed from folder contents; looped rule encoded in manifest.

sections.title: Original vs Reconstruction of Entire Songs
sections.description: Entire song reconstructions, using LAC for the acoustic (samples/instruments) encoding and decoding, and tracker data for the symbolic part.

sections.title: Original vs Reconstruction of Samples / Instruments
sections.description:
Isolated timbral units (short samples, instrument hits, plucks, bursts). We report the entire sample sets (hence, no cherry picking) used in the songs:

- Skuter - ["Loneliness"](https://amp.dascene.net/modules/S/Skuter/XM..%20loneliness.gz)
- Radix - ["TpolmGirl"](https://amp.dascene.net/modules/R/Radix/XM.tpolmgirl.gz)
- Twist - ["On a 707 Jazztrip"](https://amp.dascene.net/modules/T/Twister%28NL%29/XM.ON%20A%20707-JAZZTRIP.gz)
- Nagz - ["99 little windows"](https://amp.dascene.net/modules/N/Nagz/XM.%20%20%2099.little.windows.gz)
- Makunouchi Bento - ["Morninfizik"](https://amp.dascene.net/modules/N/Nagz/XM.%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20morninfizik.gz)
- Falcon - ["Poliamber"](https://amp.dascene.net/modules/F/Falcon%28PL%29/XM.poliamber_.gz)
- Hunz - ["Skylight"](https://amp.dascene.net/modules/H/Hunz/XM.skylight.gz)
- Jogeir Liljedahl - ["Celtic Waves"](https://amp.dascene.net/modules/J/Jogeir/XM.Celtic%20waves....gz)

For samples marked **[looped]** (for example, single waveform periods), playback is looped to make the sound audible; a single period alone would not be audible. In looped playback, samples are rendered exactly as intended by the original author, using the module's symbolic information (including envelopes, panning, and related controls). Vertical red bars indicate the start and end of the loop.
